scores.correctness_notes: The response shows valid jubilant usage patterns but misses the key recommended pattern: using jubilant.temp_model() context manager for model lifecycle management. It manually creates/destroys models instead. Also doesn't show the combined all_active + all_agents_idle pattern from gold standard.
scores.hallucination_notes: juju.add_model() and juju.destroy_model() are not documented in the gold standard and may not exist as Juju instance methods — the recommended pattern is jubilant.temp_model(). The resources parameter in deploy() is not mentioned in gold standard and may be fabricated.
